title: Cozy Visuals
description: This isn’t just another visual pack that makes Minecraft unrecognizable. Every change has a purpose, not just looks. it keeps vanilla Minecraft intact while making it more immersive and satisfying to play!
body:
![cozy visuals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d2440687bfa0819e54e12714f8e6b147d32c891.png)
---
> **Cozy Visuals** is not just another visual modpack that turns Minecraft into something flashy, cartoony, or completely different from vanilla.
> 
> Every change is carefully chosen with a purpose, focusing on improving the atmosphere and overall feel of the game rather than adding effects for the sake of it.
> 
> The goal is to make normal Minecraft more immersive, polished, and satisfying to play while staying true to its original style!
>

## ⛏️ This pack adds:
> 
> **Animation Overhaul**
> - Everything's now more fun and springy icluding the players, almost every mob, and even in first-person
> - And smaller stuff, like hanging chains and lanterns, or a little pop-up when opening an inventory
>
> **Cozier visuals**
> - Especially small details like enchantment outline glint, lightrays from the sun and bloom on snow or lava.
> - But there are also more noticeable stuff, like outline on blocks without the use of shaders, fancier clouds, more beautiful sky colors and water caustics.
> 
> **Enhanced audio system**
> - footsteps sound wet when rainings, hotbar and inventory sounds, and atmospheric sounds like birds, crickets or wind.
> 
> **New particles**
> - Specific block-breaking particles, immersive brain particles, sandstorm particles in deserts, and more quiet and subtle particles
> - like stripping log or passing with a shovel, particles, running particles, punching specific mobs particles. And not just particles, also glowing, emssive or blooming stuff.
> 
> **3D stuff**
> - Not everything is 3D, but all kind of armor, all food, Books, discs and more are.
> - Some of them even have outline like enchanted tools, and some are glowing.
>
> **New Main Menu**
> - New panorama and title.
>
> ### + Many more!


## 🗒️ Notes
> - This modpack has its own vibe. Shaders mess with the atmosphere, so please play without
> them for the intended experience.
>
> - I’m not an expert in optimization mods, but I’ve done my best to keep the pack running at a playable FPS.
> 
> - To make the game look just like it's supposed to, you'll have to set 'Particles' to 'All in video settings. Basically don't play too much with the default settings.
>

## ❓ FAQ
>
> - **Can I install shaders?**
>
> Read the notes.
>
> - **I have a suggestion/I found a bug, what should I do?**
> 
> Join the [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/SRA4tJDT) :D
>
> [![dc server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f6cbe6e30f50da94aff2eb76fdb68c440eb46c7.png)](https://discord.gg/BHuDPm2P)
